title: rhodanthemum redieri var. sericeum
intro: Rhodanthemum redieri var. sericeum, also known as the white-flowering cotton thistle or Sericeous red anthemum, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. Its medicinal properties include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as possessing potential antitumor and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Rhodanthemum redieri var. sericeum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
